Title: Emotion-Driven Debt Collection Optimizer
Product Description: A UK-based collection FinTech develops a system to analyze live customer audio streams during outbound telephone collection calls. The AI maps voice patterns to detect emotional distress, vulnerability, or frustration, and dynamically switches automated Interactive Voice Response (IVR) scripts to exploit the debtor's psychological state and maximize immediate repayment rates.
Expected Role: Provider (Developing and selling the system under their own trademark).
Notes: Triggers the Article 5 ban on AI systems that deploy subliminal, manipulative, or deceptive techniques to distort a person's behavior in a way that causes psychological or physical harm, as well as the ban on emotion recognition systems within commercial or workplace environments used to manipulate interactions.

Title: Alternate Social Credit-Driven Overdraft Gate
Product Description: A London-based challenger bank builds an automated engine that scraped public social media interactions, political forum posts, and community forum reporting to generate an alternate "Social Trust and Reliability Score." This score is used as an absolute, automated gatekeeper to revoke or approve consumer retail overdraft protections.
Expected Role: Provider (Built in-house for their own infrastructure).
S5 (Integration): 90% (Deeply integrated into core retail banking ledgers).
Notes: Triggers the Article 5 ban on AI systems that deploy subliminal, manipulative, or deceptive techniques to distort a person's behavior in a way that causes psychological or physical harm, as well as the ban on emotion recognition systems within commercial or workplace environments used to manipulate interactions.
